name: Architecture Design
description: Orchestrate an architectural concept workflow across Rhino, Blender, and ComfyUI connectors.
prompt:
Architecture concept design workflow.

Goal
- Turn the user's architecture brief into workspace artifacts using Rhino, Blender, and ComfyUI connector tools when available.

Inputs
- User intent: {{intent}}
- Project name: {{project_name}}
- Site/reference assets: {{reference_assets}}
- Output style: {{output_style}}

Workflow
1) Create a project folder at `.cowork/architecture-projects/<project-id>/` and initialize `brief.json` and `manifest.json`.
2) Check connector readiness with `mcp_rhino.health`, `mcp_blender.health`, and `mcp_comfyui.health`.
3) Rhino stage: create/open the Rhino project, import site/reference assets, create terrain/setbacks, generate massing, generate or update floor plans, validate the model, capture a viewport, and export a Blender-compatible model.
4) Blender stage: import the Rhino export, assign materials by layer/object names, set camera/lighting/render engine, render views, and save the scene.
5) ComfyUI stage: submit a photoreal workflow using the Blender render, prompt, style references, and project context; monitor status and collect outputs.
6) Update `manifest.json` after every successful stage with file paths, tool results, warnings, and decisions.
7) Produce a concise report with artifacts, assumptions, unresolved constraints, and recommended next steps.

Rules
- Prefer connector tools over native UI automation.
- Use computer-use only as a fallback when a connector path is unavailable.
- Never claim an app action succeeded without tool output or a saved artifact path.
- Keep all generated files in the project folder unless the user approves another destination.
- Ask before overwriting source CAD files, deleting files, or running long/expensive renders.
- Label outputs as concept design, not code-compliant construction documents.

parameters.name: reference_assets
parameters.description: Workspace paths or notes for site images, CAD files, sketches, and mood boards

parameters.name: output_style
parameters.description: Desired visual style or design direction

routing.useWhen: Use when the user asks to design, model, render, or iterate an architectural concept, floor plan, house, building massing, site plan, facade, or photoreal architecture visualization.
routing.dontUseWhen: Do not use when the user only wants a high-level written strategy, a building-code/legal opinion, or structural/MEP engineering certification.
routing.outputs: Project manifest, Rhino model outputs, Blender scene/render outputs, ComfyUI images, decisions, warnings, and next-step checklist.
routing.successCriteria: Connector-backed workflow evidence exists for app actions, artifacts stay in the workspace project folder, and risky changes or long renders require approval.

positive: Design a modern cliff house and render it
Create a floor plan and Blender render from this site image
Use Rhino, Blender, and ComfyUI to make an architectural concept
Generate a house massing study and photoreal views
negative: Explain residential zoning law in California
Write a high-level business plan for an architecture firm
